title: lagopsis supina
intro: Lagopsis supina, also known as Chinese lagopsis or Chinese blue spire, is a perennial plant native to China and other parts of Asia. It is a member of the mint family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory issues. Lagopsis supina is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and stems can also be used to make a decoction or tincture for medicinal purposes.
